# Azhar Hakim — IT Analyst & Software Developer

> Portfolio Website: https://azhar-hakim-portfolio.netlify.app/
> Contact Email: azarhakim55@gmail.com
> LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/azhar-hakim-2498b9217
> Primary Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

## Summary
Azhar Hakim is an experienced IT Analyst and Software Developer based in Pune, India. He has over 4 years of professional IT industry experience across enterprise IT support, Windows infrastructure management, incident resolution, PowerShell scripting, and .NET application development.

## Professional Experience

### IT Analyst — Capita (May 2023 – Present)
- Delivers enterprise endpoint support and incident resolution for business operations in Pune.
- Manages Windows desktop and server diagnostics, application troubleshooting, and connectivity issues.
- Administers core infrastructure services including DNS, DHCP, Active Directory, and system health monitoring.
- Utilizes ITSM ticketing workflows to track incidents, analyze root causes, and restore critical services within SLA windows.

### Junior Software Developer — Allscripts Technology (Sep 2021 – Apr 2023)
- Built and maintained enterprise .NET applications using C# and SQL for internal business processes.
- Performed code updates, bug fixes, and feature enhancements in collaboration with senior developer teams.
- Executed database queries and data validation scripts to maintain application data integrity.
- Provided technical documentation and tier-2 user support for application deployments.

## Core Technical Skills
- **Infrastructure & Systems**: Windows Server, Endpoint Diagnostics, Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, ITSM Ticketing.
- **Software Engineering**: C#, .NET Framework / .NET Core, SQL Database Querying, PowerShell Scripting, TypeScript, Next.js.
- **Process & Reliability**: Root Cause Analysis, Incident Escalation, Technical Documentation, System Stability.
